title: Research Policies & Guidelines — Overview
content: The Morgan State University Office of Research Administration maintains 20 research policies and guidelines that govern the conduct, administration, and stewardship of sponsored research at the university. All policies are consolidated in PI Handbook 5: Policies & Guidelines (2024-07-01 edition). Three policies are explicitly marked Board of Regents Approved: (1) Conflicts of Interest in Research and Development, (2) Misconduct in Academic Research, and (6) Intellectual Property. The full list of 20 policies: 1. Conflicts of Interest in Research and Development; 2. Misconduct in Academic Research; 3. Export Control; 4. Cost Sharing; 5. The Protection of Human Subjects in Research; 6. Intellectual Property; 7. Cost Transfer; 8. Cost Overruns; 9. Expenditures for Sponsored Award-Related Goods and Services; 10. Modification and Revision of a Sponsored Project; 11. Retention and Disposal of Records for Grants, Contracts, and Cooperative Agreements; 12. Unallowable Costs; 13. Effort Reporting; 14. Collection of Outstanding Account Receivables; 15. Residual Balance; 16. Solicitation and Acceptance of Sponsored Projects and Gifts; 17. Extra Compensation on Sponsored Projects; 18. Payment for Incidental Activities; 19. Travel; 20. Limited Submission. Contact: Office of Research Administration, Tyler Hall, Student Service Bldg, Suite 304, Baltimore, MD 21251; Phone 443-885-4044; Fax 443-885-8280; Email ask.ora@morgan.edu.
